results.justification: RL-based self-distillation with teacher-student privileged-info split overlaps with madya teaching-rights self-distillation chain mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — OPSD single-LLM teacher+student + per-token divergence IS the madya teaching-rights self-distillation chain mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — easy-to-hard curriculum distillation with CoT IS the 6-grade promotion-gated curriculum mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — self-distillation prevents catastrophic forgetting + foundation preservation IS the kuda-kuda foundation-invariant low-LR mechanism.
Comprehensive on-policy distillation survey covers all promotion-gated + foundation-preservation + self-distillation mechanisms.
EXACT TWIN — POCL difficulty-measurer + training-scheduler + progressively rising temperatures + foundation preservation IS the 6-grade promotion-gate + kuda-kuda foundation-invariant mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — self-evolving curriculum dynamically adjusts to model capability + category learning-gain IS the 6-grade capability-test-gated promotion mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — self-evolution distillation + iterative student-to-teacher IS the madya teaching-rights self-distillation chain mechanism.
